title: Create: Backtank is Jetpack
description: A simple Create mod addon that adds jetpack functionality to the backtank.
body:
A simple Create mod addon that adds jetpack functionality to the backtank.

Features

· Creative Flight - Fly like in creative mode

· Fall Damage - Not immune to fall damage by default (configurable)

· TAN Compatibility - Integration with Tough As Nails, generates heat when using jetpack (configurable)

· Air Consumption - Configurable air consumption rate

· Server-Side - Can be installed and run on server only
